data.title: OneWater Marine Inc. (NASDAQ: ONEW) will release Q1 2026 financial results on Jan 29, 2026, followed by a conference call at 8:30am ET.
data.description: OneWater Marine Inc. (NASDAQ: ONEW) based in Buford, GA, will be releasing its financial results for the first quarter of 2026 on Thursday, January 29th. The announcement will be made before the market opens on that day. The management team at OneWater will be hosting a conference call at 8:30 a.m. Eastern Time to discuss these results. Participants can join the call by dialing in to the following number: Event: OneWater Marine Inc. Fiscal First Quarter 2026 Conference Call.

data.title: Caring Senior Service opens first location in Louisville, KY to provide better services and support local economy.
data.description: Jeremy LaMontagne, the owner of Caring Senior Service in Louisville, Kentucky, aims to enhance services for seniors while also making a positive impact on the local economy. LaMontagne's mission is to provide non-medical, customized home care services. The company's commitment to seniors and the community is highlighted by its dedication to improving the quality of life for the elderly. LaMontagne's vision includes boosting the economy by creating job opportunities, with an expected increase in employment by 20% within the next year. This initiative seeks to address the needs of seniors while stimulating economic growth in the region.

data.title: Five Guys opens new flagship restaurant on Las Vegas Strip with boozy shakes and all-day breakfast offerings.
data.description: A new flagship Five Guys restaurant in Las Vegas is adding a fresh spin to the classic dining experience. Opening on Jan. 15, 2026, this innovative location features boozy shakes, all-day breakfast options, and a Vegas-inspired interior design. Located on the iconic Las Vegas Strip, this restaurant marks a first-of-its-kind venture for Five Guys. This exciting addition is set to attract food enthusiasts and visitors, offering a unique blend of flavors and ambiance.

data.title: Emerald Packaging partners with U.S. Flexible Film Initiative to boost flexible plastics recycling. First manufacturer to join.
data.description: Today, Emerald Packaging, the primary provider of retail flexible packaging for the produce sector, made history by becoming the inaugural flexible plastic manufacturer to join a coalition comprising major consumer packaged goods (CPG) brands. This significant development took place in Union City, California on January 15, 2026.

data.title: PayEngine partners with ServiceTitan to introduce tap-to-pay to $6 billion field service industry, enabling contactless payments without replacing existing processors.
data.description: A new payment middleware developed by PayEngine, a company based in Los Angeles, was launched on January 15, 2026. This processor-agnostic technology allows vertical SaaS platforms to offer contactless payments without the need to change their existing payment processors. This innovative solution enables businesses to accept payments seamlessly without relying on specific processors or purchasing additional hardware. By introducing this middleware, PayEngine is revolutionizing the way transactions are conducted within the industry.

data.title: Boston Scientific to acquire Penumbra, expanding in cardiovascular with mechanical thrombectomy and neurovascular - conference call at 8:00 a.m. ET to discuss.
data.description: Boston Scientific is set to acquire a new company to widen its cardiovascular portfolio and tackle the rising cases of vascular diseases. This move will also mark the company's expansion into mechanical thrombectomy and neurovascular areas, which are crucial strategic adjacencies. A conference call will take place at 8:00 a.m. Eastern Time to delve into the specifics of this acquisition.

data.title: IDEXX introduces new mast cell tumor testing for dogs, enhancing cancer care with expanded panel and cytology rollout.
data.description: A recent development in Westbrook, Maine has seen a significant advancement in veterinary cancer care. The expansion of the Cancer Dx Panel, along with the rollout of inVue Dx FNA cytology, is enhancing treatment options for animals. These initiatives are specifically focused on improving mast cell tumor testing for dogs. These advancements are poised to greatly benefit the veterinary community and contribute to better outcomes for canine cancer patients.

data.title: Oshkosh Defense gets $53 million order for Common Bridge Transporters from U.S. Army Contracting Command.
data.description: Oshkosh Defense LLC, a business under Oshkosh Corporation [NYSE: OSK], revealed that the U.S. Army Contracting Command – Detroit Arsenal (ACC-DTA) has made a $53 million purchase of Common Bridge Transporters (CBTs) as part of the Family of Heavy Tactical Vehicle (FHTV) V program. These CBTs are constructed on Oshkosh’s established heavy tactical truck framework, providing units with the ability to maintain the momentum of combat formations in challenging terrain or threat environments.

data.title: UGI Int'l to sell LPG businesses in Eastern Europe for €48 million to DCC plc, finalizing portfolio optimization.
data.description: Valley Forge, Pennsylvania - UGI International, LLC has finalized a deal to sell off its LPG distribution operations in Czech Republic, Hungary, Poland, and Slovakia to DCC plc for about €48 million. This move signifies a significant step in UGI International's portfolio optimization plan, enabling them to concentrate on key areas where they possess the most competitive advantage.

data.title: AMETEK (NYSE: AME) set to release Q4 2025 earnings before market opens on Feb 3, 2026. Webcast investor call to follow.
data.description: AMETEK, Inc. (NYSE: AME) will be releasing its fourth quarter 2025 earnings before the market opens on Tuesday, February 3, 2026, in BERWYN, Pa. The announcement is set to be webcasted.

data.title: Somnigroup (NYSE: SGI) to report Q4 and full year 2025 financial results on Feb 17, 2026 before NYSE opening.
data.description: In Dallas on January 15, 2026, Somnigroup International, Inc. (NYSE: SGI) announced that it will unveil its financial outcomes for the fourth quarter and entirety of 2025, concluding on December 31, before the start of NYSE trading on Tuesday, February 17, 2026.

data.title: BD has received FDA clearance for EnCor EnCompass™ Breast Biopsy System, expected to launch in early 2026.
data.description: A cutting-edge breast biopsy system that combines multiple modalities is expected to launch in early 2026. BD (Becton, Dickinson and Company), a renowned medical technology company, shared the news on Jan. 15, 2026, in Franklin Lakes, NJ. This innovative system, set to hit the market, is poised to revolutionize breast biopsies with advanced technology. Stay tuned for further updates on this development impacting the medical field.

data.title: Genesco in Nashville, Tenn., announces strategic transformation of IT operations for better efficiency and effectiveness.
data.description: Genesco, a leading company based in Nashville, Tennessee, has recently disclosed plans for a strategic overhaul of its information technology operations. This transformation aims to improve efficiency and effectiveness within the IT sector of the company. The specific details and extent of this transformation have not been fully revealed yet. This move is significant for Genesco as it seeks to modernize and streamline its IT operations to better serve its business needs. Further updates regarding this strategic change are anticipated in the near future.

data.title: Kinross is constructing Phase X, Curlew, and Redbird 2 projects to contribute 3 million ounces of production, with attractive NPV and IRR.
data.description: Contribution of 3 million ounces of production has been made, with improved grades and extended mine lives. All projects show appealing NPV and IRR at various gold price levels.
Notice of 8.3% stake in Picton Property Income Limited disclosed.
